# Test Change

Use [AGENTS.md](../../AGENTS.md), [commands.md](../../docs/ai/commands.md), and [tester.md](../../docs/ai/subagents/tester.md).

Test the current change by:

1. choosing the most relevant validation command
2. reporting what ran and what did not
3. identifying missing coverage or confidence gaps
4. summarizing the result in a short verification note
